description.text: What was once called 'das Buben Bad' or "the Boys bathroom" has now been totally transformed….it is now THE Bathroom.

Deep in the forest in south western Germany, in a beautiful home full of history and memories, they now have wonderful new views all round: lush faraway landscapes, soft trees and flowers and even a hoopoe for company. Summer is not going anywhere. In this space, it's here to stay.
